channel.title: Tech Blog
channel.description: Cutting-edge insights into technology, AI, and development

item.title: Ship SBOMs in 30 mins with Syft 1.8
item.description: Automate SBOM generation and vulnerability scanning in 30 minutes using Syft 1.8 and GitHub Actions to meet 2026 EU/US requirements and slash manual checklist time 92%

item.title: Cut three stacks to one with Postgres 17
item.description: Cut Postgres stack cost 76% with built-in caching and pub/sub — the 2026 migration guide with latency benchmarks and rollback plan.

item.title: Runbooks vs AI: which cuts outages 50%
item.description: Cut outage time 62% with AI runbooks — static vs AI runbook costs, hallucination traps, and the 30-day experiment to pick the right one.

item.title: Handle 80% of traffic with Cloudflare Workers
item.description: Cut API latency 95% and save $1100/month with Cloudflare Workers caching — real numbers, step-by-step setup for any origin

item.title: Survive Africa’s spotty internet with offline apps
item.description: Cut sync latency 68% and reduce crashes 97% with an offline-first POS app in Africa — SQLite vs WatermelonDB, version vectors, and the conflict resolution mistake most teams make in 2026.

item.title: Passkeys cut logins 83% — the real costs
item.description: Passkeys cut login failures 83% and cut infra costs 83% — how we replaced passwords and OTPs without breaking users or burning cash in 2026.

item.title: AI UI tools: where they shine (and crash)
item.description: Cut frontend build time 85% with AI UI tools — but design drift, responsive breaks, and accessibility debt lurk. Learn where these tools work, where they fail, and how to audit their output in 2026.

item.title: SLSA and Sigstore: the 2026 supply chain baseline
item.description: Cut supply chain audit failures 100% with SLSA level 3 and Sigstore—step-by-step implementation, real 2026 numbers, and the exact GitHub Actions workflow we used to pass two audits in Q1 2026.

item.title: Built $5k MRR in 6 months: no ads, no team
item.description: Hit $5,120 MRR in 6 months bootstrapping a B2B tool—no ads, no team, no investor money. Real numbers, real stack, and the exact onboarding tweak that doubled conversions.

item.title: Multi-agent frameworks in 2026: LangGraph wins
item.description: Cut multi-agent framework timeouts 80% by matching tool to mobile network reality — CrewAI vs LangGraph vs custom with 2026 benchmarks and code examples

item.title: Agents cost more than you think
item.description: Cut agent costs 50% with the right retry, timeout, and token logic — the mistakes most teams make when moving from demo to production

item.title: 80% AI code? Here’s the catch
item.description: Launched a SaaS in 6 weeks using 80% AI code — here’s where it worked, where it broke, and the hidden costs most guides ignore.

item.title: Self-healing pipelines: LLMs vs agents in 2026
item.description: Cut self-healing pipeline cost 28% and false positives 74% with agent-ops — Terraform agents beat LLMs in SOC 2 environments and on-call load

item.title: AI ate the niches first
item.description: 2026 niches that survived AI commoditisation — proprietary data loops, compliance signatures, and real-time state. Learn which Micro-SaaS moats still work and which collapsed.

item.title: AI triage vs human escalation: which breaks oncall
item.description: Cut pages 63% with AI triage — but only if you have 100+ labeled incidents and a kill switch. Otherwise, human-first wins by $10k/month at 15 engineers.

item.title: Zombie rows: soft deletes at scale
item.description: Cut storage 68% and query latency 99% by replacing soft deletes with a two-table archival pattern — benchmarks from PostgreSQL 16 and Node 20 in 2026.

item.title: Zero-trust on $500/month: WireGuard vs Cloudflare
item.description: Cut API exposure 100% with $6/month or $15 hardware: WireGuard vs Cloudflare Tunnel benchmarked in 2026 with latency, cost, and setup time.

item.title: AI agents need human loop: cost, trust, and the 78%
item.description: Cut failed AI agent actions 85% with a review queue — latency, cost, and the 78% trap most teams miss until production breaks.

item.title: SaaS niche in 2026: pick a sliver no LLM can eat
item.description: Pick a SaaS niche in 2026 that no LLM can eat — we cut churn 63% by focusing on vendor cleanup for Kenyan manufacturers. Benchmarks, infra costs, and the CLI-first approach that worked.

item.title: Build a static analyzer in 14 days with Tree-sitter
item.description: Cut static analysis runtime 7.9× with Tree-sitter 0.22.6 — parse 1.2M lines in 18 ms median, enforce policy in pre-commit hooks, and drop CI queue time 85 %.
